potion of healing.name: Potion of Healing
potion of healing.description: A ruby-red potion that restores health when consumed. Found throughout the world and essential for any adventurer. Drink as an action to regain hit points.
potion of healing.limitations: Single use, action to drink, no effect on undead

potion of greater healing.name: Potion of Greater Healing
potion of greater healing.description: A more potent version of the standard healing potion, with a deeper red color and slight glow. Heals significantly more than a basic potion.
potion of greater healing.limitations: Single use, action to drink, no effect on undead

+1 weapon.name: +1 Weapon
+1 weapon.description: A weapon with a faint magical enchantment. It grants a bonus to attack and damage rolls and counts as magical for overcoming resistances.
+1 weapon.effect: +1 to attack rolls and damage rolls, magical damage

goggles of night.name: Goggles of Night
goggles of night.description: Dark-lensed goggles that grant the wearer the ability to see in darkness. Useful for races without natural darkvision or in extremely dark environments.

bag of holding.name: Bag of Holding
bag of holding.description: A leather bag that opens into an extradimensional space larger than its outside dimensions. Weighs 15 lb regardless of contents.
bag of holding.effect: Hold up to 500 lb / 64 cubic ft, always weighs 15 lb
bag of holding.limitations: Overloading or piercing ruptures it; placing inside another extradimensional space destroys both

cloak of protection.name: Cloak of Protection
cloak of protection.description: A shimmering cloak that subtly deflects attacks and bolsters the wearer's resistance to harmful effects.
cloak of protection.effect: +1 to AC and all saving throws

ring of protection.name: Ring of Protection
ring of protection.description: A simple band that shimmers with protective magic. Grants defensive bonuses while worn.
ring of protection.effect: +1 to AC and all saving throws

wand of magic missiles.name: Wand of Magic Missiles
wand of magic missiles.description: A slender crystal-tipped wand with 7 charges. Expend charges to cast Magic Missile: 1 charge per missile (up to 3). Regains 1d6+1 charges at dawn.
wand of magic missiles.effect: Cast Magic Missile (1d4+1 force per dart, auto-hit)
wand of magic missiles.limitations: 7 charges, regains 1d6+1 at dawn, breaks on 0 if you roll a 1

rope of entanglement.name: Rope of Entanglement
rope of entanglement.description: A 50-foot coil of magical rope that animates on command. Throw it at a creature to restrain it. The target can escape with a DC 15 STR or DEX check.
rope of entanglement.limitations: DC 15 to escape, action to command, 20 ft range

shield +1.name: Shield +1
shield +1.description: A shield with a faint magical enchantment that provides additional protection beyond a normal shield.
shield +1.limitations: Requires shield proficiency, occupies one hand

spell scroll.name: Spell Scroll
spell scroll.description: A parchment inscribed with a spell. If the spell is on your class's spell list, you can read it to cast the spell without components. The scroll crumbles after use.
spell scroll.effect: Cast one spell without using a spell slot
spell scroll.limitations: Single use, must be on your class list, DC check if higher level than you can cast

amulet of proof against detection.name: Amulet of Proof Against Detection
amulet of proof against detection.description: While wearing this amulet, you are hidden from divination magic. You can't be targeted by such magic or perceived through magical scrying sensors.
amulet of proof against detection.effect: Immune to divination magic and scrying
